summary: Session 2 (last) of 103-copilot-ado-hello-world-tutorial: operator-conducted live UAT validation walk + de-draft. The operator ran the Session-2 live walk against the set's UAT checklist on a real Azure DevOps org + GitHub Copilot seat (2026-07-15) and marked all 11 functional-area walks Passes: true (Copilot seat CLI, ADO bootstrap, build+seat+auth-preflight, modules+branch policies, the Set-102-armed Open PR, the Copilot-driven session, the first-ever live azure-pipelines.yml run, the Set-102-armed Finalize, integration+touches review, tag/hotfix/rollback drills, no-CLI floor), attesting the flow passed. On that basis: (1) de-drafted docs/tutorials/module-team-hello-world-copilot-ado.md (PREVIEW banner -> validated end-to-end on a live ADO org + Copilot seat, 2026-07-15); (2) activated the preview cross-links in the base tutorial (2 spots), quick-start, and the extension README (README Marketplace visibility rides the next publish -- no extension release for this docs-only set); (3) recorded s2-uat-attestation.md with the operator's verbatim attestation + the per-item pass record; (4) discharged Set 102's armed Azure DevOps UAT (Walks 5 & 8, cross-referenced; 102 stays immutable). VERIFICATION: round-1 discovery (gpt-5-6, 2/2 fan-out) found 4 Major from one root cause -- the UAT checklist carried 11 blank duplicate rows (Passes: false, empty) appended by the UAT tool alongside the 11 real Passes: true walks, making it read as contradictory and the claims unsupported. Remediated: removed the 11 blank rows (Review 22->11, all Passes: true), corrected the attestation to reflect the real per-item passes (Result/Feedback left blank per the ad-hoc floor), bounded the de-draft claims to the walk record. Round-2 remediation-review (gpt-5-6): VERIFIED, 3 fixes accepted, 0 blocking. No code change (docs-only set); no Marketplace release (per spec: no release boundary). Loop converged in 2 bounded rounds.
